name: Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Raspberry, apricot or raspberry jam
recipeInstructions:
(From "Better Homes and Gardens Cookbook," Meredith.)
1. Place half the cake cubes in the bottom of a 2-quart clear glass bowl. Moisten with some sherry.
2. Cover with jam.
3. Top with the remaining cake cubes.
4. Add enough additional sherry to moisten the cake well.
5. In a saucepan, beat the eggs and egg yolk. Stir in milk and granulated sugar.
6. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the custard coats a metal spoon.
7. Remove from heat and cool immediately in an ice water bath; stir occasionally.
8. Spoon the cooled custard over the cake.
9. Beat the egg white to soft peaks. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
10. Whip cream with vanilla.
11. Fold in the egg white mixture.
12. Pile the mixture atop the custard.
13. Refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight.
14. Garnish with slivered almonds.
